tests.description: ATDD E2E tests for Story 2-4 Request-to-Commitment Linkage and Terminal Enforcement (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Given a request lifecycle starts, when it is processed, then it reaches an explicit terminal request state.
Linked commitments independently reach terminal commitment states.
Given operations staff review unresolved work, when terminal enforcement or linkage failures occur, then UI/API views expose clear reconciliation actions and current lifecycle status.

summary: Generated 2 FAILING E2E tests for Story 2-4
